outcome.summary: Guardian repaired launch state before launch.
details: Guardian repaired the managed Java runtime before launch.

outcome.summary: Guardian blocked launch preflight.
details: Guardian blocked managed Java runtime repair because it was not safe to apply.
guidance: Reinstall or repair the affected version/runtime before launching again.

outcome.summary: Guardian blocked launch preflight.
details: Guardian could not repair the managed Java runtime automatically.
guidance: Reinstall or repair the affected version/runtime before launching again.

outcome.summary: Guardian repaired a launcher-managed artifact.
details: The launcher can continue from the repaired state.

outcome.summary: Guardian blocked automatic artifact repair because it was unsafe.
details: The launcher did not mutate files that were not proven launcher-managed.

outcome.summary: Guardian could not repair the launcher-managed artifact.
details: Check connection and storage permissions before trying again.

outcome.summary: Guardian classified the install download failure as retryable.
details: The install stopped because a provider or network download was unavailable or interrupted.
guidance: Retry the install after checking connection and storage availability.

outcome.summary: Guardian paused install retry after repeated provider failure.
details: The install stopped because the same provider or network download failure repeated within the retry cooldown.
guidance: Wait a few minutes, then retry after checking connection and storage availability.

outcome.summary: Guardian blocked install because provider metadata could not be trusted.
details: The install did not continue with invalid provider metadata.
guidance: Retry later or choose another version source.

outcome.summary: Guardian blocked loader install because the required base install failed.
details: The loader install did not continue after the base Minecraft install failed.
guidance: Retry the base version install, then retry the loader install.

outcome.summary: This Minecraft version needs a Java runtime that is not available for this device.
details: Java runtime component java-runtime-gamma is not available for linux-riscv64.
guidance: This version cannot be installed on this device.

outcome.summary: This Minecraft version needs Rosetta 2 on Apple Silicon Macs.
details: Java runtime component java-runtime-legacy needs Rosetta 2 on this Mac.
guidance: Install Rosetta 2 by running `softwareupdate --install-rosetta --agree-to-license` in Terminal, then retry.

outcome.summary: Guardian blocked install because Axial could not write launcher-managed files safely.
details: The install did not mutate files after the filesystem refused the operation.
guidance: Check app data permissions and retry the install.

outcome.summary: Guardian blocked install because temporary download state could not be written safely.
details: The install did not continue after temporary download state could not be written safely.
guidance: Check app data permissions and disk availability before retrying the install.

outcome.summary: Guardian blocked install because verified download data could not be promoted safely.
details: The install did not replace launcher-managed files after atomic promotion failed.
guidance: Check app data permissions and retry the install.

outcome.summary: Guardian blocked install to protect user-owned or unknown files.
details: The install did not automatically mutate a target whose ownership was unsafe.
guidance: Move the affected files or choose a launcher-managed library location before retrying.

outcome.summary: Guardian suppressed a repeated launch self-healing retry for managed Java recovery because the same recovery failed recently.
details: Guardian suppressed a repeated launch self-healing retry for managed Java recovery because the same recovery failed recently.
guidance: Review the latest game log or change the affected launch setting before retrying.

outcome.summary: Guardian suppressed a repeated launch self-healing retry for explicit JVM argument recovery because the same recovery failed recently.
details: Guardian suppressed a repeated launch self-healing retry for explicit JVM argument recovery because the same recovery failed recently.
guidance: Review the latest game log or change the affected launch setting before retrying.

outcome.summary: Guardian suppressed a repeated launch self-healing retry for JVM preset recovery because the same recovery failed recently.
details: Guardian suppressed a repeated launch self-healing retry for JVM preset recovery because the same recovery failed recently.
guidance: Review the latest game log or change the affected launch setting before retrying.

outcome.summary: Guardian suppressed a repeated launch self-healing retry for custom GC flag recovery because the same recovery failed recently.
details: Guardian suppressed a repeated launch self-healing retry for custom GC flag recovery because the same recovery failed recently.
guidance: Review the latest game log or change the affected launch setting before retrying.

outcome.summary: performance update was blocked by Guardian safety supervision
performance update was blocked by Guardian safety supervision
performance update was blocked by Guardian safety supervision
performance update was blocked by Guardian safety supervision
performance update was blocked by Guardian safety supervision
performance update was blocked by Guardian safety supervision
Guardian kept Axial running after persisted operation state could not be trusted.
details: Some restart-resume records were ignored instead of resuming unsafe work.
guidance: Retry the affected performance or benchmark operation if it is still needed.
